title: Bottle of Gender
description: Adds a Bottle of Gender to the Minecraft 23w13a_or_b April Fools' snapshot, along with data-drivable genders.
body:
Bottle of Gender is a mod created for the FlashFest 23w13a_or_b modding challenge, and adds exactly what it says on the tin: a Bottle of Gender, which changes your gender when drunk. What will it change into? There's only one way to find out...

Bottles of Gender are crafted by brewing light blue dye into bottles of dragon's breath, and more genders can be added via datapacks. They can affect your skin, gender term, name color, size, and possibly more in the future!

FlashFest was a really fun challenge and I super enjoyed diving through the snapshot code to figure out how to do everything I want. I can't wait for next year's, and I hope you all enjoy what I've made!
